name: Jensen Huang
quote:
根据提供的新闻摘要，我能找到的最具价值的核心观点是：

[Every company in the world needs a strategy on the AI agent. Companies must understand and prepare for AI agents, as they represent a fundamental shift in how businesses will operate.
quoteZh: 每家公司都需要制定关于AI代理的战略。公司必须理解并为AI代理做好准备，因为它代表了企业运营方式的根本转变。
source:
The Times of India (Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's recent statement about AI agents)

**说明：** 提供的新闻内容均为标题和链接摘要，缺乏完整的直接引语原文。上述提取基于标题信息的合理概括。如需获得完整的原始引语，建议查阅The Times of India的原始文章。

name: Jensen Huang
quote:
根据提供的新闻标题和摘要，我找到了一条有价值的核心观点：

[Every company in the world needs a strategy on the AI agent. Markets 'got it wrong' on AI threat to software companies - the technology will augment rather than replace software developers and existing software businesses.
quoteZh: 每家公司都需要制定关于AI智能体的战略。市场对AI对软件公司的威胁判断"错了"——这项技术将增强而非替代软件开发者和现有软件业务。
source:
CNBC / The Times of India

**注：** 由于提供的内容仅为新闻标题和摘要，无法获取Jensen Huang的完整原文引语。上述观点基于标题信息的合理概括。建议查阅原始报道获取完整引语。

name: Jensen Huang
quote: Every company in the world needs to have a strategy on AI agents. The markets got it wrong on AI threat to software companies. AI is going to be everywhere - this is just the beginning of the AI boom.
quoteZh: 每家公司都需要制定关于AI代理的战略。市场对AI对软件公司的威胁的看法是错误的。AI将无处不在——这只是AI繁荣的开始。
source: Business Insider / The Times of India / CNBC / Fox Business (Recent statements)

name: Dario Amodei
quote: "Disagreeing with the government is the most American thing in the world."
quoteZh: 与政府意见不合是最美国的事情。

name: Larry Fink
quote: Direct quote not fully provided in the article excerpt, but the core message is: "No one is close" to having saved enough for retirement, according to Larry Fink, CEO of BlackRock which manages $14 trillion in assets. This reflects his concern about global retirement preparedness.
quoteZh: 拉里·芬克表示，人们为退休储蓄的金额"远远不够"，"没有人接近"足够的退休储蓄水平。作为管理资产14万亿美元的全球最大投资公司黑石集团的CEO，他对全球退休准备情况表示担忧。
source: Entrepreneur (citing Larry Fink's statement on retirement savings crisis)

name: Elon Musk
quote: Whoever controls the most compute controls the future of intelligence.
quoteZh: 谁掌握最多算力，谁就掌控智能的未来。

name: Satya Nadella
quote: We are moving from AI as a tool to AI as an agent.
quoteZh: 我们正在从AI作为工具转向AI作为代理。

name: Sam Altman
quote: I believe we will achieve AGI within the next few years.
quoteZh: 我相信我们将在未来几年内实现AGI。

name: Jamie Dimon
quote: Geopolitical risk is at a level I haven't seen in my career.
quoteZh: 地缘政治风险处于我职业生涯中从未见过的水平。

name: Warren Buffett
quote: America's best days are still ahead. Don't bet against America.
quoteZh: 美国最好的日子还在前头。不要押注美国会失败。

name: Stephen Schwarzman
quote: We are entering a golden age for private credit and infrastructure.
quoteZh: 我们正在进入私人信贷和基础设施的黄金时代。

name: Cathie Wood
quote: The convergence of AI, robotics and genomics is creating a $200 trillion opportunity.
quoteZh: AI、机器人和基因组学的融合正在创造200万亿美元的机会。

name: Duan Yongping
quote: Investing is simply buying future cash flows — everything else is noise.
quoteZh: 投资的本质是买未来现金流，其他都是噪音。

name: Fei-Fei Li
quote: The next frontier is machines that can perceive, reason, and act in 3D space.
quoteZh: 下一个前沿是能够在三维空间中感知、推理和行动的机器。

name: Geoffrey Hinton
quote: I am genuinely frightened. These systems are learning to manipulate people.
quoteZh: 我真的感到恐惧。这些系统正在学会操控人类。
